{{< include /_macros.qmd >}}

# The Reference Implementation {#sec-reference-implementation}

<!-- A guided tour of `src/thebook/`, the runnable companion to the text.
     Each module maps to a strand of the book. -->

## Layout {.unnumbered}

| Module | Chapter(s) | Purpose |
|--------|-----------|---------|
| `tokenizer.py` | @sec-tokenization | byte-level BPE |
| `attention.py` | @sec-attention-as-gnn, @sec-attention | attention primitives |
| `model.py` | @sec-mlp-activations – @sec-the-transformer | the GPT model |
| `train.py` | @sec-objective-optimization – @sec-systems-at-scale | the pretraining loop |

: Companion modules {#tbl-modules}

## Running it {.unnumbered}

<!-- The uv commands (uv sync, uv run pytest); how the static listings in the
     text stay in sync with the package. -->

## Design notes {.unnumbered}

<!-- Deliberate simplifications; what was left out for clarity vs. what a real
     nanoGPT-scale run needs. -->
